description: Compound request: classify deterministic lead ingestion and a reasoning-driven SDR agent separately, coupled only via data.

conversation.text: Ingest new leads from the website form to our CRM, and separately have an SDR agent that qualifies and reaches out.

processExpectations: The agent explains that ingesting leads into the CRM is deterministic, while the SDR agent's qualification-and-outreach reasoning creates legitimate anchor ambiguity, and that both parts are coupled only via shared lead data rather than a single control flow.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
